name: Blockade
event_text: Subtract 1 VP during the War Status Phase of each Winter turn. (VASSAL Note: VP markers will be placed at the beginning of each Winter turn, or right away if event is played during a Winter turn. Although the VP "formally" arrives in War Status phase at the end of the turn, the only time VP is actually checked for autovictory is at the end of the turn during War Status -- so in other words the VP total will always be right at the time it is needed. Since the Vassal module doesn't offer a convenient "stop and have a War Status phase right here", this is the implementation that seems to generate the least confusion and provide the most accuracy.)

name: Pleve
event_text: RU units get a +1 drm for an attack or defense.

name: Putnik
event_text: May only be played in 1914 and 1915. SB units get a +1 drm for an attack or defense.

name: Withdrawal
event_text: Defending units negate one required Corps step loss and instead must retreat 1 space. Full strength Attacking units may advance. If no Corps step(s) lost, an Army step loss may be negated. See rule 12.6 for details.

name: Severe Weather
event_text: Defending units in a mountain space in Fall

name: Moltke
event_text: May only be played in August or September 1914. CP Activation in Belgium or France costs 1 OPS per unit (not space) until the "Falkenhayn" card is played. All units must be activated in a space. Supersedes Sud Army and Eleventh army card effects.

name: Entrench
event_text: Place a Level 1 Trench (not improve a Level 1 to Level 2) in any space occupied by a supplied friendly Army. Both players may now entrench. Only one player may play this card as an event.

name: Rape of Belgium
event_text: May only be played if CP played "Guns of August". May only be played as an Event if the Allied War Status is still at Mobilization. Subtract 1 VP.

name: Romania
event_text: Romania joins the Allies. See 9.5.2.5 for restriction on play as a non-event when CP are at Total War.

name: Italy
event_text: Italy joins the Allies. Add 1 VP during the War Status Phase of each turn if unplayed after Allied War Commitment Level is Total War. See also 9.5.2.5 for restrictions on play as a non-event when CP are at Total War.

name: Hurricane Barrage
event_text: A BR attack adds a +1 drm. ANA, AUS, CND, or PT do not qualify as BR for this purpose.

name: Air Superiority
event_text: A BR or FR attack adds +1 drm. ANA, AUS, CND, or PT do not qualify as BR for this purpose.

name: Phosgene Gas
event_text: A FR attack adds +1 drm.

name: Cloak and Dagger
event_text: Allied player may examine all cards in the CP player's hand and then conduct Operations using this card.

name: Lusitania
event_text: May only be played after "Blockade" and before "Zimmermann Telegram". Subtract 1 VP.

name: Great Retreat
event_text: All RU units attacked this turn may retreat before combat. This must be announced before flank attempts, play of combat cards, and die rolls. No combat resolution takes place. The RU unit(s) must retreat 1 space. Forts and non-RU units in the space are still attacked. Aborted CP attacks still count for MO purposes.

name: Landships
event_text: Allows play of "Royal Tank Corps".

name: Yudenitch
event_text: Place the Russian CAU Army in any supplied space in Russia on the Near East map. Can enter prior to TU entry.

name: Salonika
event_text: Allied player must SR at least one and up to 3 BR

name: MEF
event_text: May only be played if Turkey is at war and before "Salonika". Place the MEF Army at any MEF space. See 9.5.3.5.

name: Grand Fleet
event_text: If played in the Allied Action Round immediately following the "High Seas Fleet", cancel that card. Cannot be played as an event at any other time.

name: Yanks and Tanks
event_text: Allied player conducts Operations using this card and all Combats involving a US unit during this Action Round get a +2 drm.

name: Mine Attack
event_text: A BR attack vs. an entrenched CP Defender adds a +1 drm. May only be used in one Combat per turn. ANA, AUS, CND, or PT do not qualify as BR for this purpose.

name: Independent Air Force
event_text: Cancel or prevent Rathenau Event bonus GE RP for the rest of the game.

name: They Shall Not Pass
event_text: Cancels any retreat for losing a Combat if defending in a non-destroyed FR fort space. A FR unit must be present in the space. Card remains face up until a combat is lost.

name: 14 Points
event_text: Only the Allied player may offer Peace Terms for the rest of the game. Subtract 1 VP.

name: Arab Northern Army
event_text: May only be played if Turkey is at war. Place the British ANA Corps in the Arabia space. See 11.1.15.

name: Greece
event_text: Greece joins the Allies. Play of Greece does not prevent play of MEF or Salonika.

name: Kerensky Offensive
event_text: May only be played after "Fall of the Tsar" and before the "Bolshevik Revolution". Allied player conducts Operations using this card and one RU attack vs. a space with any AH, BU, or TU units adds a +2 drm. AP player announces intent to use this drm prior to the CP player's use of defensive CC.

name: Brusilov Offensive
event_text: Allied player conducts Operations using this card and adds a +1 drm to ALL RU attacks this Action Round. Also for 1 RU attack vs. only non-GE CP units cancel all trench effects. The negation of trench effects must be announced prior to the Attempt Flank Attack Step.

name: Royal Tank Corps
event_text: May only be played after "Landships". Cancels trench column shifts for a BR attack against a clear space in France

name: Sinai Pipeline
event_text: Cancels Sinai -3 drm for Allied units only. Place Sinai Pipeline marker in the Sinai space. Can be played regardless of who controls Sinai and the effect cannot be reversed. Summer turn desert effects remain. Allows play of "Allenby".

name: Allenby
event_text: May only be played after "Sinai Pipeline". Place the British NE Army in Alexandria. See 9.5.3.4.

name: Everyone Into Battle
event_text: May only be played after at least one of the following has occurred: "Blucher," "Michael" or "Peace Offensive." Allied units in Italy, France and Belgium are considered one nationality for Activation for the rest of this turn (only). Rule 12.1.11 still applies.

name: Convoy
event_text: May only be played after "U-Boats Unleashed". Cancels effects of that card. Subtract 1 VP.

name: Army of the Orient
event_text: Place the French Orient Army in the Salonika space if Allied controlled, subject to stacking limits. See 9.5.3.4.

name: Zimmermann Telegram
event_text: May only be played if U.S. Entry marker is in the "Zimmermann Telegram Allowed" box. Subtract 1 VP. US joins the Allies. Allows play of "Over There" card on any following turn.

name: Over There
event_text: May be played on any turn after "Zimmermann Telegram". Allows play of "US Reinforcements." ALL Allied RP cards played now include 1 US RP.

name: Paris Taxis
event_text: Allied player receives 1 extra RP to immediately flip a reduced French Army in or adjacent to Paris to its full strength side. The RP may not be spent to replace an eliminated unit.

name: Paris Taxis
event_text: Allied player receives 1 extra RP to immediately flip a reduced French Army in or adjacent to Paris to its full strength side. The RP may not be spent to replace an eliminated unit.

name: Russian Cavalry
event_text: Place the two Russian cavalry corps in any one space inside Russia containing a supplied Russian Army. They may not be placed in violation of the stacking limit. May not operate in the NE. They may not replace an eliminated Russian Army.

name: Russian Cavalry
event_text: Place the two Russian cavalry corps in any one space inside Russia containing a supplied Russian Army. They may not be placed in violation of the stacking limit. May not operate in the NE. They may not replace an eliminated Russian Army.

name: Russian Guards
event_text: A RU attack adds +1 drm.

name: Alpine Troops
event_text: An attack only involving IT units adds +1 drm.

name: Czech Legion
event_text: Remove from the game 1 AH Corps from the CP Eliminated

name: Czech Legion
event_text: Remove from the game 1 AH Corps from the CP Eliminated

name: Maude
event_text: Any one attack made by BR units tracing supply to Basra may fire on the Army Table.

name: Maude
event_text: Any one attack made by BR units tracing supply to Basra may fire on the Army Table.

name: The Sixtus Affair
event_text: Roll on the Allied 0-19 Peace Terms Table. This event does not qualify as a Peace Offer and may not be accepted for a draw.

name: Backs to the Wall
event_text: A space with a BR Army in France

name: Backs to the Wall
event_text: A space with a BR Army in France

name: Influenza
event_text: May be played if Combined War Status is 30+. Neither side may perform RP actions for the rest of this turn. Already played RPs are not lost.

name: Influenza
event_text: May be played if Combined War Status is 30+. Neither side may perform RP actions for the rest of this turn. Already played RPs are not lost.

name: Guns of August
event_text: May only be played in the first Action Round of the August 1914 turn. The Liege fort is destroyed. Place the GE 1st and 2nd Armies in the Liege space. The GE 1st, 2nd, and 3rd Armies are activated for Combat.

name: Wireless Intercepts
event_text: Play in Attempt Flank Attack step. A Flank Attack Attempt involving at least one GE unit (army or corps) vs. a space containing only RU units is automatically successful. Play prior to Attempt Flank Attack Step.

name: Von Francois
event_text: A GE attack vs. RU units adds a +1 drm. May be used against spaces with RU and other nationalities.

name: Severe Weather
event_text: Defending units in a mountain space in Fall

name: Landwehr
event_text: CP player receives 2 extra RPs to immediately flip supplied reduced strength German units to their full strength side. They may not be spent to replace eliminated units. May not be played if Berlin is AP controlled or out of supply.

name: Entrench
event_text: Place a Level 1 Trench (not improve a Level 1 to Level 2) in any space occupied by a supplied friendly Army. Both players may now entrench. Only one player may play this card as an event.

name: Race to the Sea
event_text: CP units may now end movement in Ostend, Calais, and Amiens. Card may also be played as an event after CP War Status is at 4 or higher.

name: Reichstag Truce
event_text: May not be played after CP War Commitment Level is Total War. Add 1 VP.

name: Sud Army
event_text: One AH unit and up to 2 GE corps may stack together and be Activated for a cost of 1 OPS point. A different stack may be chosen each Action Round. If a second AH unit or a second non-GE corps unit is present, then the activation cost is 2 OPS points. This event does not supersede rule 12.1.11.

name: Oberost
event_text: German units may now attack spaces containing RU forts. (They may always besiege such spaces). May still be played for War Status after CP War Status is 4 or higher.

name: Falkenhayn
event_text: May only be played on Aug

name: Chlorine Gas
event_text: A GE attack adds +1 drm.

name: Liman von Sanders
event_text: A TU (SN unit does not count) attack or defense adds a +1 drm.

name: Mata Hari
event_text: CP player may examine all cards in the Allied player's hand and then conduct Operations using this card.

name: Fortified Machine Guns
event_text: A GE entrenched defender adds a +1 drm.

name: Flamethrowers
event_text: A GE attack adds +1 drm.

name: Libyan Revolt
event_text: May only be played if there are no Allied units in the Libya space. Place the SN unit in Libya. SN unit is always in supply. Spaces converted by the SN unit are checked normally during the Attrition phase. See 11.1.6.

name: High Seas Fleet
event_text: High Seas Fleet sorties. Unless the Allied player plays the "Grand Fleet" as his next action, add 1 VP.

name: Place of Execution
event_text: May only be played after "Falkenhayn" and before "H-L Take Command". A GE attack vs. an undestroyed FR fort space adds a +2 drm. May be played alone as an event (for War Status) if all FR forts are already destroyed.

name: Zeppelin Raids
event_text: Subtract 4 BR RPs from the BR RP total during the Replacement Phase of this turn.

name: Tsar Takes Command
event_text: May only be played if the Russian Capitulation marker is in the "Tsar Takes Command Allowed" box. See 16.4

name: 11th Army
event_text: The GE 11th Army (only) and any CP Corp(s) may stack together and be Activated for a cost of 1 OPS point. If a second CP army is present, then the activation cost for the space is 2 OPS points. Event can be played prior to German 11th Army Reinforcement Event and also if GE 11th is already permanently eliminated. This event does not supersede rule 12.1.11.

name: Alpenkorps
event_text: A GE attack to or from a mountain space adds +1 drm.

name: Kemal
event_text: A TU unit defender (SN unit does not count) with a combat factor of 1 or more may fire on the Army Table. May only be used in one Combat per turn. If after a flank attack the required TU unit with a combat factor of 1 or more is no longer present, convert the remaining factors from the Corps Fire Table to the Army Fire Table (round "0" Corps Fire Table column up to the "1" Army Fire Table Column)

name: War In Africa
event_text: Permanently remove 1 full strength BR corps on the map or in the Reserve Box from the game or add 1 VP (Allied choice). If a full strength BR corps is not available, then a reduced BR corps may be used. ANA, AUS, CND, BEF, or PT do not qualify as BR for this purpose.

name: Walter Rathenau
event_text: Add 1 extra GE RP during the Replacement Phase of every turn even if the CP did not play Replacements on a turn. Can be played for War Status after "Independent Air Force".

name: Bulgaria
event_text: Bulgaria joins the CP.

name: Mustard Gas
event_text: A GE attack adds +1 drm.

name: U-Boats Unleashed
event_text: May only be played after "H-L Take Command". Subtract 1 BR RP during the Replacement Phase of each turn and prevent play of "US Reinforcements" until "Convoy" is played.

name: Hoffmann
event_text: Adds +1 to all future CP Mandated Offensive die rolls.

name: Air Superiority
event_text: A GE attack adds +1 drm.

name: Von Below
event_text: Cancels all trench effects for one GE attack against only IT unit(s).

name: Von Hutier
event_text: Attacker fires first and cancels all trench effects for a GE attack against a space containing RU unit(s). A trench does not need to be present. Play prior to Attempt Flank Attack Step. (Defending space may also contain other AP nationalities).

name: Treaty of Brest Litovsk
event_text: May only be played after "Bolshevik Revolution". RU units may no longer attack. CP units may not attack RU units except TU units may attack on the Near East map. Both sides may still move into unoccupied spaces and may still suffer attrition, besiege forts, and resolve sieges. Also see 5.5.2.

name: French Mutiny
event_text: Flip Allied MO markers to "FR Mutiny" side. Current and future FR MOs are considered FR Mutiny while the MO marker is in the FR box. If any FR units not stacked with US units attack on a FR Mutiny turn, add 1 VP for the turn (not for each attack). FR Mutiny does not apply to attacks outside of FR, BE, GE.

name: Michael
event_text: May only be played after "H-L Take Command". Cancels all trench effects for 1 GE attack and adds a +1 drm for that attack. Play prior to Attempt Flank Attack Step. A trench does not need to be present.

name: Blucher
event_text: May only be played after "H-L Take Command". Cancels all trench effects for 1 GE attack. Play prior to Attempt Flank Attack Step. A trench does not need to be present.

name: Peace Offensive
event_text: May only be played after "H-L Take Command". Cancels all trench effects for 1 GE attack. If attacker does not advance into the space, subtract 1 VP. Play prior to Attempt Flank Attack Step. A trench does not need to be present.

name: Fall of the Tsar
event_text: May only be played if Russian Capitulation marker is in the "Fall of Tsar Allowed" box (see 16.4). Add 1 VP plus an additional 2 VP if Romania is still neutral. Activation for combat of spaces containing RU units costs an extra OPS per RU unit beyond the first, regardless of whether these units participate in combat. RU corps may no  longer move (can still SR) between the To Caucasus Box and the Near East.

name: Bolshevik Revolution
event_text: May only be played if  Russian Capitulation marker is in the "Bolshevik Revolution Allowed" box. No more than 1 RU RP may be spent each turn. Current and future RU MOs become "None".

name: H-L Take Command
event_text: Allows play of "Michael", "Blucher", "Peace Offensive", "Hoffmann", and "U-Boats Unleashed". Prevents play of "Place of Execution". Current and future German MOs become "None".

name: Lloyd George
event_text: May not be played after Michael, Blucher, or Peace Offensive. No BR attacks vs. Level 2 entrenched GE units may be made for the rest of this turn. The effect of this card is canceled by play of Michael, Blucher, or Peace Offensive events. This event may mean that a BR MO cannot be fulfilled in a specific turn.

name: Withdrawal
event_text: Defending units negate one required Corps step loss and instead retreat 1 space. This also cancels any retreat caused by losing the combat. If no Corps step(s) lost, an Army step loss may be negated. See rule 12.6 for details.

name: Withdrawal
event_text: Defending units negate one required Corps step loss and instead retreat 1 space. This also cancels any retreat caused by losing the combat. If no Corps step(s) lost, an Army step loss may be negated. See rule 12.6 for details.

name: Kaisertreu
event_text: An AH attack or defense adds +1 drm.

name: Kaisertreu
event_text: An AH attack or defense adds +1 drm.

name: STAVKA Timidity
event_text: May be played after Tsar Takes Command. No RU attacks vs. entrenched GE units (only) the rest of this turn. Mixed CP stacks may be attacked. This is a reusable event, place in the discard pile after use..

name: Polish Restoration
event_text: May be played if the CP currently controls Warsaw. Subtract 1 VP. Add the three Polish Corps to the CP Reserve Box. These Corps are treated as German for all purposes but may not be replaced if Warsaw is Allied.

name: Polish Restoration
event_text: May be played if the CP currently controls Warsaw. Subtract 1 VP. Add the three Polish Corps to the CP Reserve Box. These Corps are treated as German for all purposes but may not be replaced if Warsaw is Allied.

name: Turk Determination
event_text: A TU Defender in any non-trench space is considered at Trench Level 1 for all purposes for that combat only. Brusilov Offensive can negate the trench effect of this card. The SN unit is not considered Turkish for the purpose of applying this combat card.

name: Turk Determination
event_text: A TU Defender in any non-trench space is considered at Trench Level 1 for all purposes for that combat only. Brusilov Offensive can negate the trench effect of this card. The SN unit is not considered Turkish for the purpose of applying this combat card.

name: Haig
event_text: Entrenched GE units in France

name: Achtung: Panzer
event_text: A GE attack vs. a clear space adds +1 drm.

name: Russian Desertions
event_text: May be played after Fall of the Tsar. CP may reduce four 2-step RU units.

name: Alberich
event_text: May not be used if Allies play Royal Tank Corps or Yanks and Tanks. Cancels any one Allied attack in France

name: Alberich
event_text: May not be used if Allies play Royal Tank Corps or Yanks and Tanks. Cancels any one Allied attack in France

name: Prince Max
event_text: May not be played after turn 16. Increases War Status by 3.
